sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63244" key="li/qwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐ´θ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n63244.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a turning into stone, petrifying</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.953e</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n63244.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">work in stone</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λ. ποικίλη</foreign> Aristeas <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">74</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
